2604.14493.title: Pushing the Limits of On-Device Streaming ASR: A Compact, High-Accuracy English Model for Low-Latency Inference
2604.14493.paper_summary: Deploying high-quality automatic speech recognition (ASR) on edge devices requires models that jointly optimize accuracy, latency, and memory footprint while operating entirely on CPU without GPU acceleration. We conduct a systematic empirical study of state-of-the-art ASR architectures, encompassing encoder-decoder, transducer, and LLM-based paradigms, evaluated across batch, chunked, and streaming inference modes. Through a comprehensive benchmark of over 50 configurations spanning OpenAI Whisper, NVIDIA Nemotron, Parakeet TDT, Canary, Conformer Transducer, and Qwen3-ASR, we identify NVIDIA's Nemotron Speech Streaming as the strongest candidate for real-time English streaming on resource-constrained hardware. We then re-implement the complete streaming inference pipeline in ONNX Runtime and conduct a controlled evaluation of multiple post-training quantization strategies, including importance-weighted k-quant, mixed-precision schemes, and round-to-nearest quantization, combined with graph-level operator fusion. These optimizations reduce the model from 2.47 GB to as little as 0.67 GB while maintaining word error rate (WER) within 1% absolute of the full-precision PyTorch baseline. Our recommended configuration, the int4 k-quant variant, achieves 8.20% average streaming WER across eight standard benchmarks, running comfortably faster than real-time on CPU with 0.56 s algorithmic latency, establishing a new quality-efficiency Pareto point for on-device streaming ASR.
2604.14493.paper_summary_zh: 部署高品質的自動語音辨識（ASR）於邊緣設備上需要模型在完全依賴CPU而不使用GPU加速的情況下，聯合優化準確性、延遲和記憶體佔用。我們對最先進的ASR架構進行了系統的實證研究，涵蓋了編碼器-解碼器、轉換器和基於LLM的範式，並在批次、分塊和串流推理模式下進行評估。通過對超過50個配置的全面基準測試，涵蓋OpenAI Whisper、NVIDIA Nemotron、Parakeet TDT、Canary、Conformer Transducer和Qwen3-ASR，我們確定NVIDIA的Nemotron Speech Streaming是資源受限硬體上實時英語串流的最強候選者。然後，我們在ONNX Runtime中重新實現完整的串流推理管道，並對多種後訓練量化策略進行了受控評估，包括重要性加權k-量化、混合精度方案和四捨五入至最近的量化，並結合圖級運算子融合。這些優化將模型從2.47 GB減少到僅0.67 GB，同時將字錯誤率（WER）保持在全精度PyTorch基準的絕對1%以內。我們推薦的配置，即int4 k-量化變體，在八個標準基準測試中實現了8.20%的平均串流WER，並在CPU上以0.56秒的算法延遲穩定地運行得比實時快，為設備上的串流ASR建立了一個新的質量-效率Pareto點。
2604.14493.author: Nenad Banfic et.al.
2604.14493.authors: Nenad Banfic, David Fan, Kunal Vaishnavi, Sam Kemp, Sunghoon Choi, Rui Ren, Sayan Shaw, Meng Tang
